recommendations.title: The Land Before Time II: The Great Valley Adventure
recommendations.overview: This time, while building a hideaway in their new home of the Great Valley, Littlefoot and the gang rescue a mysterious egg from two scheming egg-nappers and make a starling surprise - and new friend - when the egg hatches.

recommendations.title: Piranhaconda
recommendations.overview: A hybrid creature - half piranha and half anaconda -- attacks a low-budget horror movie crew on location near her nest when her egg is stolen. Now they must outrun and kill the deadly piranhaconda as well as stop the mad scientist who stole the egg -

recommendations.title: Godzilla vs. Mechagodzilla II
recommendations.overview: The U.N.G.C.C. (United Nations Godzilla Countermeasure Center) recovers the remains of Mecha-King Ghidorah and construct Mechagodzilla as a countermeasure against Godzilla. Meanwhile, a giant egg is discovered along with a new monster called Rodan. T

recommendations.title: Hatching
recommendations.overview: 12 year old Tinja is desperate to please her mother, a woman obsessed with presenting the image of a perfect family. One night, Tinja finds a strange egg. What hatches is beyond belief.

recommendations.title: Dark Light
recommendations.overview: A woman returns to her family home and discovers it to be inhabited by monsters.

recommendations.title: Lake Placid 3
recommendations.overview: A game warden moves his family to Lake Placid, once the site of deadly crocodile attacks. Locals assure him the crocs are gone, but his mischievous young son finds a few baby crocs and begins feeding them. They quickly grow into very big adults and s

recommendations.title: The Water Horse
recommendations.overview: A lonely boy discovers a mysterious egg that hatches a sea creature of Scottish legend.

recommendations.title: Angel's Egg
recommendations.overview: In the ruins of a strange city, a young girl takes care of a large egg she holds carefully in her arms. She bonds with a boy who is searching for a bird he saw in a dream.

recommendations.title: Ice Age: The Great Egg-Scapade
recommendations.overview: A harried prehistoric bird mother entrusts her precious, soon-to-hatch egg to Sid. When she recommends him to her neighbours, business booms at his new egg-sitting service. However, dastardly pirate bunny, Squint, who is seeking revenge on the herd,

recommendations.title: A Movie of Eggs
recommendations.overview: A small egg named Toto decides that he wants to fulfill his purpose in life and become a chicken instead of dying in a frying pan; so he starts a quest to return to the farms along with his new friend, the noisy egg Willy and a crazy bacon stripe. Th
recommendations.director: Gabriel Riva Palacio Alatriste, Rodolfo Riva Palacio Alatriste
